response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories change minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth needs time.
Time passes fast.
Fast days end.
Ends bring new starts.
Starts offer hope.
Hope fuels growth.
Growth requires patience.
Patience builds strength.
Strength aids focus.
Focus helps reading.
Reading takes effort.
Effort yields results.
Results show progress.
Progress marks change.
Change alters views.
Views shift slowly.
Slow shifts matter.
Matter counts much.
Much work done.
Done tasks finish.
Finish lines near.
Near goals appear.
Appear clear now.
Now comes math.
Math solves puzzles.
Puzzles need logic.
Logic finds answers.
Answers reveal facts.
Facts prove numbers.
